pages.title: Combat Stats
pages.text: $(b)Speed$() (base 3) - Tiles you can move per turn. +1 per point.$(br2)$(b)Action Points$() (base 3) - Actions per turn (attack, use items). +1 per point.$(br2)$(b)Melee Power$() - Bonus damage with swords and axes. +1 per point.$(br2)$(b)Ranged Power$() - Bonus damage with bows and crossbows. +1 per point.

pages.title: Defensive & Utility Stats
pages.text: $(b)Vitality$() - Increases max HP by +2 per point.$(br2)$(b)Defense$() - Reduces all incoming damage by 1 per point.$(br2)$(b)Luck$() - Improves loot quality and critical hit chance.$(br2)$(b)Resourceful$() - Earn +1 extra emerald per level and get trader discounts.

pages.title: Build Tips
pages.text: $(b)Glass Cannon:$() Max Melee/Ranged Power + AP for burst damage.$(br2)$(b)Tank:$() Vitality + Defense to survive anything.$(br2)$(b)Speedster:$() Speed + AP to outmaneuver enemies.$(br2)$(b)Merchant:$() Resourceful + Luck for maximum loot and gold.$(br2)There's no wrong build - experiment!
